evals.prompt: How do I set up Message Streams in Postmark to separate transactional and broadcast emails?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on configuring Message Streams to isolate transactional and broadcast email traffic

assertions.name: mentions_stream_types
assertions.description: Mentions the two stream types: transactional and broadcast

assertions.name: mentions_separate_infrastructure
assertions.description: Mentions that streams provide separate sending infrastructure and reputation isolation

assertions.name: mentions_creation_methods
assertions.description: Mentions creating streams via the Postmark dashboard or API

evals.prompt: I need to send a password reset email using Postmark's API with a template
evals.expected_output: Guidance on sending a templated transactional email via the Postmark API

assertions.name: mentions_email_with_template_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions the POST /email/withTemplate endpoint for sending templated emails

assertions.name: mentions_template_identifier
assertions.description: Mentions using TemplateId or TemplateAlias to specify which template to use

assertions.name: mentions_template_model
assertions.description: Mentions TemplateModel for passing dynamic data into the template

assertions.name: mentions_server_token_header
assertions.description: Mentions the X-Postmark-Server-Token header for API authentication

evals.prompt: How do I configure Postmark webhooks to track bounces and update my database?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on setting up Postmark bounce webhooks and handling the event payload

assertions.name: mentions_webhook_url_configuration
assertions.description: Mentions configuring a webhook URL in Postmark server settings or via API

assertions.name: mentions_bounce_payload_fields
assertions.description: Mentions bounce webhook payload fields such as RecordType, Type, Email, or BouncedAt

assertions.name: mentions_retry_schedule
assertions.description: Mentions Postmark's webhook retry schedule for failed delivery attempts
